reviewed_items.reviewer_notes: Gate 6 (Scope Check) triggers. The flagged code path at beacon-chain/blockchain/kzg/validation.go::VerifyCellKZGProofBatchFromBlobData::L135-149 is only reachable via the Beacon API handler (beacon-chain/rpc/eth/beacon/handlers.go:1090 in validateBlobs, called from PublishBlock). The Beacon API is explicitly out-of-scope per BUG_BOUNTY_SCOPE.json lines 60 and 89: 'Vulnerabilities requiring the user to have publicly exposed an API, such as the Beacon API, are explicitly out-of-scope'. While the code reading is factually correct (ComputeCells returns len(cells) from external c-kzg-4844 library without validation, then cells[columnIndex] is accessed in loop without bounds check), the finding falls under an excluded category. 01e reference: outputs/01e_PARTIAL_W3B4_1771748827.json, property PROP-57888860-post-003: 'compute_cells must produce exactly CELLS_PER_EXT_BLOB cells from a valid blob' with assertion 'forall compute_cells(blob) -> cells: len(cells) == CELLS_PER_EXT_BLOB'.
reviewed_items.spec_reference: compute_cells must produce exactly CELLS_PER_EXT_BLOB cells from a valid blob.
